centre.name: Vision & Place
centre.corePurpose: Define the shared place vision that anchors every domain and keeps commercial, planning, delivery, management, community, and policy decisions aligned.
centre.keyInsight: The centre is the organising idea of the framework: a clear place vision gives every domain a common test for quality, trade-offs, partnership confidence, and long-term stewardship.

domains.name: Commercial Domain
domains.corePurpose: Create enduring, risk-adjusted economic value that survives market cycles and delivers measurable investor confidence.
domains.pitchDeckContribution: Clear, credible value proposition and investor language that explains "why this makes commercial sense" - translating public inputs into private returns.
domains.keyInsight: We deliberately build a "Value Bridge" that converts government infrastructure, approvals, and de-risking into quantifiable IRR uplift for private partners. Chasing maximum density often destroys absorption velocity; a 1% improvement in net operating income is frequently worth more than a 5% reduction in construction cost.
domains.signatureDeliverables: Investment-grade Business Case with sensitivity tables, Value-Uplift Allocation Model, Commercial Stress-Test Report (base/adverse/upside scenarios).
domains.proprietaryTools: Value Bridge Matrix, Investor Readiness Diagnostic (25-question scorecard), Margin Resilience Model (tests 15% cost and 24-month delay shocks).
domains.successMetrics: Equity IRR >= benchmark + risk premium, Development margin 18-22% (project-specific), Capital attraction velocity (time to term sheet).

domains.name: Planning Domain
domains.corePurpose: Deliver masterplanning, urban design excellence, and regulatory pathways that are ambitious yet approvable and future-proof.
domains.pitchDeckContribution: The "why this place will work" narrative - technical excellence, regulatory achievability, and urban design quality explained in accessible, compelling terms.
domains.keyInsight: Planning is never just a technical exercise; it is the most powerful storytelling tool we have. Front-loading "approvability testing" and designing for regulatory arbitrage delivers better outcomes with fewer controls - the best plans feel inevitable in hindsight but required deliberate trade-off discipline upfront.
domains.signatureDeliverables: Place-Based Planning Canvas (one-page integration map), Regulatory Pathway Optimisation Strategy, Design Excellence + Deliverability Guidelines.
domains.proprietaryTools: Planning Pressure-Test Workshop (4-hour fatal-flaw surfacing session), Urban Design Decision Matrix (single scorecard weighing amenity, density, activation, and cost).
domains.successMetrics: Approval timelines achieved, Design quality scores, Infrastructure integration index, Compliance with emerging policy targets.

domains.name: Delivery Domain
domains.corePurpose: Convert approved plans into physical reality on time, on budget, and without compromising the original vision.
domains.pitchDeckContribution: The "how we will actually deliver this" reassurance - clear staging, early activation, and momentum-building stories that address the universal stakeholder fear of non-delivery.
domains.keyInsight: The strongest projects are "over-planned" on staging, procurement, and early works from day one. Treating delivery as a design constraint (not an after-thought) prevents the vision from being eroded during construction.
domains.signatureDeliverables: Integrated Delivery Roadmap with explicit decision gates, Procurement & Packaging Strategy, Early Activation & Catalyst Plan.
domains.proprietaryTools: Delivery Risk Gateway Process (six mandatory checkpoints), Phasing Optimisation Engine (balances cashflow, risk, and market response).
domains.successMetrics: On-time / on-budget delivery rate, Milestone achievement, Cost certainty, Safety and quality performance.

domains.name: Management Domain (Governance & Stewardship)
domains.corePurpose: Maintain alignment, decision quality, and vision integrity over multi-year (often decade-long) project lifecycles.
domains.pitchDeckContribution: The governance and stewardship story - "how we will stay on track, protect the vision, and adapt together."
domains.keyInsight: Most failed partnerships do not die from bad faith - they die from governance structures built for the easy times. Strong governance is the ultimate proof point that the vision is not just words on a page.
domains.signatureDeliverables: Joint Governance Charter with clear escalation paths, Adaptive Management Playbook, Vision Integrity Scorecard (quarterly health check).
domains.proprietaryTools: Governance Effectiveness Diagnostic (scored across 8 dimensions), Scenario Planning Toolkit, Vision Guardianship Protocol.
domains.successMetrics: Governance maturity score, Stakeholder satisfaction and alignment metrics, Vision integrity maintained over time, Adaptability to change.

domains.name: Community Experience Domain
domains.corePurpose: Create places that people actively choose, defend, and take pride in - turning stakeholders into long-term advocates rather than passive recipients.
domains.pitchDeckContribution: The human, lived-experience narrative that connects the project to real lives, aspirations, and belonging.
domains.keyInsight: The highest-value community outcomes are rarely the loudest demands - they are the quiet needs discovered through deliberate, repeated co-creation. Social licence is a leading indicator, not a lagging risk.
domains.signatureDeliverables: Experience Blueprint & Activation Strategy, Social Licence Trajectory Map, Community Stewardship Model.
domains.proprietaryTools: Co-Creation Workshop Series (structured 5-stage methodology), Social Licence Index (quantitative tracking), Experience Journey Mapping (pre- and post-occupancy).
domains.successMetrics: Community Net Promoter Score, Activation and usage rates, Diversity & inclusion metrics, Long-term stewardship commitment.

domains.name: Policy & Strategic Alignment Domain
domains.corePurpose: Explicitly align the Vision & Place with current and emerging government policy objectives, funding priorities, and strategic agendas.
domains.pitchDeckContribution: The powerful "this project advances government priorities" narrative - housing supply, service delivery, economic growth, sustainability, regional development, etc.
domains.keyInsight: This domain is the bridge that translates the project vision into language that resonates with ministers, departments, funding bodies, and political stakeholders. It must be repeatedly stress-tested and refreshed as policy landscapes evolve.
domains.signatureDeliverables: Policy Alignment Matrix, Government Objectives Mapping, Strategic Narrative Briefs.
domains.proprietaryTools: Policy Alignment Diagnostic + Narrative Stress-Test Workshop.
domains.successMetrics: Demonstrable contribution to key government targets, Speed of policy-level approvals, Stakeholder feedback on strategic fit.
